text.title: Wireframing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is the feature spec / acceptance criteria reachable?
Are ≥3 layout variants required for the key screens?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce ≥3 variants per screen with full state coverage + annotations + open questions.
apply minimal: single-variant wireframe is allowed only when stakeholder explicitly approves; flag deviation in open_questions.
block: refuse to generate annotations without spec context; route back to PM for acceptance criteria.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, spec reachable, three variants required → produce wireframes per r3-three-variants; ensure all states per r2-all-states; surface open questions per r6-open-questions-section.
